bot.welcome:
👋 Hello\! I'm *Memo* — your personal AI diary 📓

Just write or send voice messages — I'll figure out what to save and how\.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*🧠 What I can do:*
🍽 Count calories and macros automatically
🏃 Track workouts and activity
💸 Keep track of expenses and purchases
💧 Monitor water, sleep, weight
💭 Save thoughts and feelings
📊 Build a dashboard with your metrics
🔍 Answer questions about your entries
🧠 Remember your rules forever

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*✍️ Try writing:*
_"Ate 200g chicken and 50g rice"_
_"Ran 5km in 28 minutes"_
_"Spent $15 on groceries"_
_"My glass \= 300ml"_ — I'll remember forever

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*💎 Plans:*
✨ *Spark* — free forever
  Up to 100 entries · 3 AI widgets · 5 retrospectives

🌟 *Nova* — 250 ⭐/mo
  Up to 2000 entries · 15 AI widgets · AI retrospectives · Knowledge graph

💫 *Supernova* — 500 ⭐/mo
  Unlimited everything · Full history · Data export

Subscription is managed via the mini\-app \(Telegram Stars\)\.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*📋 Commands:*
/language — change language 🌍
/help — full guide
/stats — today's summary
/invite — invite a friend and get 30 days of Nova 🎁
/cancel — reset bot state
bot.help:
📖 *Memo Guide*

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*Just write or speak — I'll figure it out:*

🍽 *Food & Nutrition*
_"Ate 150g salmon and salad"_
_"Had oatmeal with banana for breakfast"_
_"Drank 30g protein"_

💪 *Workouts & Activity*
_"Did 40 squats, 30 min gym"_
_"Ran 5km in 28 minutes"_
_"Yoga 45 minutes"_

💸 *Expenses & Finance*
_"Spent $15 on groceries"_
_"Coffee $3, lunch $9"_

💧 *Water, Sleep, Weight, Health*
_"Drank 2 glasses of water"_
_"Slept 7 hours, woke up refreshed"_
_"Weight 78kg"_
_"Blood pressure 120/80"_

💭 *Thoughts & Feelings*
Just write what you think — I'll save it and won't forget

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*❓ Questions about your data:*
_"How many calories did I eat today?"_
_"What did I eat yesterday?"_
_"How much did I spend this month?"_
_"Tell me about my workouts this week"_
_"What's my average sleep over the last 7 days?"_

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*✏️ Editing & Deleting:*
_"Delete today's sleep entries"_
_"Fix the last entry — I ran 7km, not 5km"_

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*🧠 Rules \(I'll remember forever\):*
_"My glass \= 300ml"_
_"When I say workout — that's 20 min and 150 kcal"_
_"I'm vegan"_
_"My goal is 2000 kcal per day"_

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*📋 Commands:*
/stats — today's summary
/report\_daily — today's retrospective
/report\_weekly — this week
/report\_monthly — this month
/recommendations — smart AI advice
/invite — invite a friend and get 30 days of Nova 🎁
/language — change interface language 🌍
/cancel — reset bot state

🎤 *Voice messages:* just send one — I'll transcribe and save it

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
*💎 Plans & Subscription:*

✨ *Spark* — free forever
  Up to 100 entries · 3 AI widgets · 5 retrospectives

🌟 *Nova* — 250 ⭐/mo \(or 637 ⭐/quarter, 2100 ⭐/year\)
  Up to 2000 entries · 15 AI widgets
  AI retrospectives · Knowledge graph · 1 year feed

💫 *Supernova* — 500 ⭐/mo \(or 1275 ⭐/quarter, 4200 ⭐/year\)
  Unlimited entries and AI widgets
  Full history · Data export · Priority processing

Subscription is managed via the mini\-app \(Telegram Stars\)\.
Manual renewal — no auto\-charge\.

🎁 *Referral program:* invite a friend via /invite — both of you get \+30 days of Nova when a subscription is purchased\.
bot.stats.empty:
Nothing logged today yet 🙂

Write something — and I'll start tracking!
bot.report.empty:
Not enough entries for a retrospective 🙂

Keep journaling — and I'll do a full analysis!
bot.remind.invalid_time: Invalid time. Format: /remind drink water at 15:00
bot.remind.error: Failed to save reminder. Please try again 🙏
bot.invite.error: Failed to create referral link. Please try again 🙏
bot.invite.message:
🎁 Invite a friend — get 30 days of Nova for free!

Share your link:
{link}

When your friend signs up and subscribes — you'll automatically get 30 days of Memo Nova as a gift.

Reward is granted once per new user.
bot.cancel.reply:
✅ Reset. You can start fresh!

Just write or send a voice message — I'm ready 📓
miniapp.onboarding.slide0.title: Your personal diary
miniapp.onboarding.slide0.body: Just write or speak — Memo will figure out what to save. Food, workouts, expenses, thoughts.
miniapp.onboarding.slide1.title: AI that understands you
miniapp.onboarding.slide1.body: Memo analyses your entries, counts calories and macros, tracks activity and answers questions about your past.
miniapp.onboarding.slide2.title: Dashboard & graphs
miniapp.onboarding.slide2.body: All your metrics in one place. See progress, patterns and trends — effortlessly.
miniapp.onboarding.slide3.title: Smart recommendations
miniapp.onboarding.slide3.body: Memo notices if you sleep too little, drink too much alcohol or lack protein — and suggests what to change.
miniapp.onboarding.slide4.title: Your data is protected
miniapp.onboarding.slide4.body: All entries are encrypted on your device before saving. Even we can't read them. Your privacy is our priority.
miniapp.onboarding.slide5.title: Support the project
miniapp.onboarding.slide5.body: Basic features are free forever. Stars Pro unlocks advanced analytics and recommendations.

bot.referral.welcome:
👋 Hello\! You were invited by *@{username}* 🎁

I'm *Memo* — your personal AI diary in Telegram 📓

*How the referral program works:*
• Subscribe to *Nova for 1 month* — 250 ⭐
• You'll get *\+30 days Nova free* on top
• @{username} will also get *\+30 days Nova*

Open Memo to get started 👇
bot.referral.reward_granted:
🎉 *Your friend subscribed\!*

You received *30 days of Memo Nova* free as a reward for the invitation\. Thank you for sharing Memo\! 🙏
